title: Monkey walks into hotel buffet, picks his snack, walks out
author: Popkin
summary: Watch a mischievous monkey casually walk into a hotel and steal a treat from the breakfast buffet. From the employee's reaction, I have a feeling that this little fellow is a regular at the breakfast table. The monkey pulls off the mission with zero interference and struts proudly out of the hotel with his snack. —
full_text:
Watch a mischievous monkey casually walk into a hotel and steal a treat from the breakfast buffet. From the employee's reaction, I have a feeling that this little fellow is a regular at the breakfast table. The monkey pulls off the mission with zero interference and struts proudly out of the hotel with his snack.

My favorite part of the video is the way that the monkey hesitates before choosing a treat. With so many options, he needs a minute to decide what he'll choose. They say that beggars can't be choosers, but this monkey is clearly the exception.

Despite being a breakfast thief, this monkey seems pretty well-mannered. He's clearly used to being around humans and has a level of confidence that makes him seem just like another guest at the hotel. I'd invite him to sit at my breakfast table if I were there.
